results.title: Telangana CM orders setup of digital governance panel
results.description: Telangana Chief Minister A Revanth Reddy on Tuesday directed officials to constitute a committee to strengthen ‘digital governance’ in the State. Reddy, who held a meeting with officials, said the committee, comprising officials, should submit its report in 100 days. He sought details of the implementation of ‘digital governance’ and instructed officials to formulate plans for digital governance and draft relevant legislation, a release said.

results.title: Honda to generate 3,800 jobs in India by 2028 through two-wheeler capacity boost
results.description: Honda Motorcycle & Scooter India will add over 3,800 jobs by 2028, with its Vithalapur plant in Gujarat set to become Honda's largest motorcycle assembly plant globally after expansion.

results.title: Flight School Pilot Jumps To His Death From Moving Plane, Had Asked Student To 'Carry On'
results.description: Pilot Andrés Bertazzo died after jumping from a moving plane in Toledo, Argentina. Later, his 22-year-old student managed to land the plane safely

results.title: Life Lesson quote by Bruce Willis: by 'You can't undo the past, but you can certainly not...' - Hollywood icon's powerful advice on embracing growth instead of regret
results.description: Bruce Willis achieved global stardom with iconic action roles and diverse film performances. He also shared a life lesson about learning from past mistakes. His family announced his retirement from acting due to aphasia and dementia diagnoses. They now raise awareness for frontotemporal dementia and support affected individuals. Willis's influential filmography continues to entertain audiences worldwide.
